creator: nicolai@petri.cc
text:
I can confirm this bug. It seems like broken man files in the net-snmp 
library. Is there a manexpert that can step up and quickly explain whats 
wrong. An example file is netsnmp_library.3 - it seems all files that 
trigger this are missing SYNOPSIS keyword - is it ok to just add that ?

---
Nicolai Petri
